data:
{"operationName":"TripTypeDestinations","variables":{},"extensions":{},"query":"query TripTypeDestinations {
  tripTypeDestinations {
    campaignId
    carouselName
    title
    subtitle
    destinations {
      imageUrl
      title
      distance
      formattedPrice
      typeIds
      destId
      destType
      order
      __typename
    }
    types {
      id
      title
      __typename
    }
    checkin
    checkout
    nbAdults
    nbChildren
    childrenAges
    nbRooms
    __typename
  }
}
"}
